original_image_tags: Faint stamp at bottom reads: "[illegible] HAND OFF [illegible] ..." and other illegible text.

elements.description: A typed memorandum page with header 'Incident LAF 1208 I 16 July 1947'. The body text includes a 'MEMORANDUM FOR THE OFFICER IN CHARGE' and 'AGENT'S NOTES' detailing an interview with Mr. Kenneth Arnold regarding a report of strange objects. There are two black hole-punch marks at the top and a handwritten annotation 'Incl #1' at the bottom left.

judge.reason: Description A claims there is a visual element (a faint stamp) while Description B states the page is a typed memorandum with no mention of any stamp, creating a direct contradiction on the presence of visual content.
